description:
Open source, lightweight, native, supports (HTTP, BitTorrent, Magnet , etc.) for downloading.

Gopeed (full name Go Speed), a high-speed downloader developed by Golang + Flutter, supports (HTTP, BitTorrent, Magnet) protocol, and supports all platforms. In addition to basic download functions, Gopeed is also a highly customizable downloader that supports implementing more features through integration with APIs or installation and development of extensions.
Note: Due to the adjustment of the Windows version storage directory in PR 1087, upgrading will cause data loss. To retain old application data, you can manually move the gopeed.db, database.hive, database.lock, and extensions files from the application directory to the ./storage directory.
🆕 Features
- feat: update storage directory path for Windows @monkeyWie (#1087)
- feat: add environment variables configuration support @monkeyWie (#1088)
- feat: web login page @monkeyWie (#1058)
- feat(extension): TLS fingerprinting support in xhr @monkeyWie (#1054)
🐛 Bug Fixes
- fix: remove invalid characters in HTTP headers @monkeyWie (#1053)
🚀 CI/CD
- ci: update macOS version to macos-14 @monkeyWie (#1086)
🌎 Internationalization
- feat: add german language support @Local-Gay-Communist (#1084)
